cloudflare_zone_id.description: Cloudflare zone ID to attach rulesets to. Sourced from $CLOUDFLARE_ZONE_ID or equivalent in CI.

cloudflare_account_id.description: Cloudflare account ID. Required when attaching account-scoped rulesets / lists. Sourced from $CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID.

example-admin-panel_custom.name: example-admin-panel-custom
example-admin-panel_custom.description: CDN Security Framework: custom firewall rules (geo/IP/UA/fingerprint)

rules.expression: (lower(http.user_agent) contains "sqlmap" or lower(http.user_agent) contains "nikto" or lower(http.user_agent) contains "acunetix" or lower(http.user_agent) contains "masscan" or lower(http.user_agent) contains "curl" or lower(http.user_agent) contains "wget" or lower(http.user_agent) contains "python-requests")

example-admin-panel_managed.name: example-admin-panel-managed
example-admin-panel_managed.description: CDN Security Framework: managed ruleset bindings

rules.description: AWS AWSManagedRulesCommonRuleSet → Cloudflare Cloudflare Managed Ruleset (equivalent)
AWS AWSManagedRulesKnownBadInputsRuleSet → Cloudflare Cloudflare OWASP Core Ruleset (APPROXIMATE — see docs/cloudflare-waf-parity.md)
AWS AWSManagedRulesIPReputationList → Cloudflare Cloudflare Exposed Credentials Check Managed Ruleset (APPROXIMATE — see docs/cloudflare-waf-parity.md)
UNSUPPORTED AWS managed rule: AWSManagedRulesAnonymousIpList. No Cloudflare mapping — emitted disabled. See docs/cloudflare-waf-parity.md.
